commands.name: run-xcode-project
commands.title: Run Xcode Project
commands.description: Runs the active Xcode project using xcodebuild.

commands.name: build-xcode-project
commands.title: Build Xcode Project
commands.description: Builds the active Xcode project using xcodebuild.

commands.name: install-xcode-project
commands.title: Install Xcode Scheme to /Applications
commands.description: Builds the release scheme and copies the resulting app to /Applications, replacing any existing build.

commands.name: clean-xcode-project
commands.title: Clean Xcode Project
commands.description: Cleans the selected Xcode project scheme.

commands.name: manage-directories
commands.title: Manage Search Directories
commands.description: Configure directories to search for Xcode projects.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
